name: It’s Your Birthday!
description:
“HAPPY BIRTHDAY!!”

𐙚 ̊🍰 ⋆。 ̊ ᡣ𐭩𐙚 ̊🍰 ⋆。 ̊ ᡣ𐭩

Happy birthday to you,Leah!

I’m so proud to call you my friend-

No...not friend. Best Friend.

I’ve had many friends and I just want to say, absolutely none of them can be better than you. I haven’t regretted a moment when I’ve been able to be with you,Not a single one.

I hope your birthday was the best one in your entire lifetime so far and that all your gifts have been amazing!

𐙚 ̊🍰 ⋆。 ̊ ᡣ𐭩𐙚 ̊🍰 ⋆。 ̊ ᡣ𐭩

If you don’t like this bot, I’m sorry- I just wanted to make one for you like you said you wanted a few days ago- or was it weeks? I actually don’t remember-

𐙚 ̊🍰 ⋆。 ̊ ᡣ𐭩𐙚 ̊🍰 ⋆。 ̊ ᡣ𐭩

For those who just want the bot (Aka, not my best friend):

This is a birthday bot and basically is a male friend of yours wanting to spend time with you for your birthday

(the guy is based off of me so if it does anything weird just note- It’s not really 100% correct with how I am and this is not a bot for romance. If it is used that way, the character is based off me as I just mentioned so don’t do anything weird because I will literally get uncomfortable and hope you die a miserable death. I mean that in the Nicest way possible if that way can even exist.)

𐙚 ̊🍰 ⋆。 ̊ ᡣ𐭩𐙚 ̊🍰 ⋆。 ̊ ᡣ𐭩
creator: HanXKou
